risk_if_not_implemented: Without Recovery Images, the organization may be unable to recover from disruptions, resulting in data loss and extended downtime.

compensating_control_1.name: Encrypting Data At Rest
compensating_control_1.description: Cryptographic mechanisms exist to prevent unauthorized disclosure of data at rest.
compensating_control_1.justification: Encrypting Data At Rest (CRY-05) provides cryptographic protection that compensates for the absence of Recovery Images (BCD-11.3) by ensuring data confidentiality and integrity through alternative technical means. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Backup & Restoration Hardware Protection
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to protect backup and restoration hardware and software.
compensating_control_2.justification: Backup & Restoration Hardware Protection (BCD-13) provides resilience and recovery capability that compensates for the absence of Recovery Images (BCD-11.3) by ensuring the organization can restore operations and data when the primary control is absent. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
